title: gussonia lundiana
intro: Gussonia lundiana, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Gussonia lundiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
